title: Pentek #10 Big Blue housing (1 in. inlet)
notes: Housing for 10 x 4.5 in. cartridges; confirm NPT port size and pressure rating before fittings.

title: Pentek #10 Big Blue housing (0.5 in. inlet)
notes: Same 10 x 4.5 in. sump as other BB10 housings; port size differs from 158643 — match fittings to stamped NPT size.

title: Pentek #10 Big Blue housing (0.75 in. inlet)
notes: 10 x 4.5 in. sump; common alternate port size vs 158643 — verify stamped NPT before fittings.

title: Pentek #10 Big Blue stainless reinforced housing
notes: 10 x 4.5 in. sump; stainless wrap/reinforcement style varies by revision — confirm bracket and o-ring kit.

title: Pentek #20 Big Blue housing (1 in. inlet)
notes: Housing for 20 x 4.5 in. cartridges; confirm port size and bracket load before install.

title: Pentek #20 Big Blue housing (alt port layout)
notes: 20 x 4.5 in. sump compatible with standard BB20 cartridges — compare stamped ports to your existing head.

title: Pentek #10 slim line clear housing
notes: Housing for 9.75 x 2.5 in. standard slim cartridges — not compatible with Big Blue 10 x 4.5 in. cartridges.

title: GE whole home water filtration system
notes: Often serviced with GE FXHTC (sediment) and FXWPC (carbon); confirm your installed manifold.

title: GE whole home water filtration system
notes: Higher-capacity GE whole-house line; commonly uses FXHTC / FXWPC / FXHSC class cartridges — verify stamped OEM.

title: GE whole home water filtration system
notes: GE whole-house line; confirm which FX cartridges your installed head accepts.

title: GE whole home water filtration system
notes: GE whole-house line; verify stamped OEM numbers before ordering.

title: Culligan whole-house heavy-duty housing
notes: Heavy-duty sump sized for standard 10 x 4.5 in. cartridges; CW5-BB is a common Culligan-branded fit.

title: 3M Aqua-Pure whole house water filter system
notes: AP810 is the common OEM sediment replacement; verify model sticker on installed head.

title: 3M Aqua-Pure dual-stage whole house system
notes: Typically AP810 (sediment) plus AP811 (carbon) on OEM dual-stage AP802 installs — confirm series.

title: Whirlpool dual Big Blue whole house filtration system
notes: Commonly serviced with WHKF-GD05 and WHKF-WHPL; confirm your manifold order and clip style.

title: Watts Flowmatic whole house filter housing
notes: Watts BB-style sump; commonly paired with W50PEHD cartridges and often cross-compatible with standard BB10 cartridges — verify o-ring and sump length.

title: SpringWell CF1 whole-house filter system
notes: Confirm filter model on housing before ordering replacements.

title: Aquasana Rhino EQ-600 whole-house filter
notes: Sticker shows series; replacement kit numbers vary by generation — verify before purchase.

title: 3M Aqua-Pure AP903 whole house water filter system
notes: High-flow AP900-class head; commonly serviced with AP917HD-S + AP910R on dual-stage installs — confirm your sticker.

title: Pentair #10 Big Blue housing (Pentair / Pentek ecosystem)
notes: Pentair-branded BB10-class sump commonly cross-compatible with Pentek BB10 cartridges — verify o-ring and stamped port size.

title: Kinetico K5 drinking water station (dealer serviced)
notes: Filtration stages and cartridges are installed by Kinetico dealers — use official support for fit.
